## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Layer

- [ ] documentation
- [ ] R package foundation
- [ ] runtime API
- [ ] adapter or registry
- [ ] artifact generation
- [ ] validation/gate/patch
- [ ] security
- [ ] fixtures/conformance
- [ ] release

## CAP-Digest impact

- Upstream version:
- Stable source-family scope:
- Does this change a public conformance claim?
- Does this modify vendored upstream content?

## Compatibility

- [ ] canonical artifact shapes remain valid
- [ ] field ID grammar is unchanged or explicitly reviewed
- [ ] finding-code meanings are unchanged
- [ ] registry resolution remains deterministic
- [ ] fallback remains structural-only

## Security and privacy

Describe source access, redaction, escaping, remote I/O, credentials, isolation, and follow-up effects.

## Evidence

- [ ] unit tests
- [ ] adapter contract tests
- [ ] fixture tests
- [ ] negative/security tests
- [ ] snapshots
- [ ] schema validation
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] changelog
